description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
A Zoox vehicle (Vehicle 1) in autonomy was stopped at a red traffic light on northbound Capp St at the intersection with 24th St in San 
Francisco. At that time, an SUV (Vehicle 2), heading southbound on Capp St, failed to stop for the red traffic light and entered the 
intersection, causing a collision with a passenger car (Vehicle 3) that was traveling eastbound on 24th Street. The SUV spun after making 
contact with the passenger car and collided with the stopped Zoox vehicle, damaging the front bumper on the driver’s side and driver’s side 
fender, mirror, and sensors on the Zoox vehicle. The police and EMS personnel were called to the scene. The driver of the SUV left the 
scene without exchanging information. The passenger car appeared to sustain significant damage to the front end. There were no reported 
injuries. 
Print
Clear Form
